subtitle: Review AI-proposed lore for under-described entities, then promote what you approve into this book's canon. Enriched drafts are private variants until you promote them.

h0.tooltip: An enriched variant — never authored canon until you promote it.

verify.clean: Verified clean — no contradiction, anachronism, injection, or regurgitation found.
verify.degraded: Verification degraded — canon was unavailable, so contradiction couldn't be fully checked.

detail.h0_note: This is an enriched variant (origin=enrichment, confidence<1.0). It becomes canon only when you promote it.
detail.h0_banner: This is an enriched variant — not the original canon. It becomes canon only when you promote it.

proposals.error: Couldn't load proposals. Please try again.

empty.title: No proposals yet
empty.description: Detect gaps and auto-enrich to generate proposals for this book.

actions.retract_confirm_desc: This removes the enriched supplement from this book's canon. The original entity is preserved — you can re-promote later.
actions.author_only: Only the book's author can review and promote enrichment.

promote.title: Promote to canon
promote.h0: This enriched variant will become authored canon for this book. The permanent origin marker is kept, so it stays traceable as originally enriched.
promote.responsibility: By promoting, you adopt this content as the author and confirm you hold the rights to the sources it was built from. Not legal advice.

gaps.title: Gaps
gaps.subtitle: Under-described entities in this book's glossary, ranked by importance. Detect, then auto-enrich chosen gaps as a background job.
gaps.detect_hint: Click "Detect gaps" to scan this book's glossary coverage.
gaps.none: No gaps detected — every entity is well described.
gaps.gate_note: P2 fabrication / P3 recook require the eval gate to pass (diverse judges).

sources.title: Sources
sources.subtitle: License-tagged corpus for retrieval / recook.
sources.name: Name
sources.ingest_placeholder: Paste public-domain / licensed source text to chunk + embed…
sources.default_deny: Default-deny: only public-domain / licensed sources may be recooked. You are responsible for the license of sources you register.
